summary: RETEST of the 3 click-handler failures from iteration_31 (FAIL_snap_pill_click_toggle, FAIL_clear_anchor_btn_click, FAIL_cycle_axes_btn_click). Main agent's consolidation fix (3 sibling drei <Html> overlays merged into a single <Html> with vertical flex column wrapper data-testid='ruler-hud-stack' + pointerEvents:'auto') RESOLVES all 3 click-handler regressions. Frontend-only Playwright run via window.__forgeStore. All retested flows now PASS. Sanity checks (HUD content, pills count, axis-cycle UI label updates, same-object measurement, escape clearance, cascade-on-delete) also PASS.

test_results_detail.PASS_hud_stack_renders: Single <Html> wrapper with data-testid='ruler-hud-stack' present when anchor set
test_results_detail.PASS_clear_anchor_btn_click: Click ruler-clear-anchor-btn: rulerAnchor=null, rulerMode=true (preserved), ruler-hud-stack removed from DOM
test_results_detail.PASS_same_object_measurement: Anchor + target on same Cube → ruler-dim-x/y/z each show '20' (mm) in xyz mode

critical_code_review_comments: The consolidation fix is clean: a single <Html position={[ax,ay,az]}> wraps the anchor card, snap-pills row, and pick-target hint in a flex-column with pointerEvents:'auto' on the wrapper and pointerEvents:'none' only on the hint. e.stopPropagation() is correctly used inside each button onClick to avoid R3F canvas pointer capture.
Viewport.jsx is now 1157 lines — extracting RulerAnchorLayer to its own file (e.g., /lib/RulerAnchorLayer.jsx) would aid testability and readability.
seed_data_creation: Cube primitive via window.__forgeStore.getState().addPrimitive('cube'); ruler anchor seeded via setRulerAnchor({objId, objName:'Cube', snapKey:'corner-0', snapKind:'corner', worldPoint:[-10,0,-10]}); cleaned via removeObject between tests.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Anchor shape MUST include worldPoint:[x,y,z] (NOT x,y,z as scalar props) when calling setRulerAnchor — RulerAnchorLayer destructures anchor.worldPoint at line 633. The store has cycleRulerAxes (no setRulerAxesMode setter), so cycle to specific mode via repeated cycle calls. The 3 previously-failing UI clicks now reach their handlers thanks to the single-<Html> consolidation. Bundle hot-reload was active during tests.
rca_of_the_issue: ROOT CAUSE (resolved): In iter_31, ruler-anchor-hud, ruler-snap-pills, and ruler-pick-target-hint were rendered as 3 separate <Html> components all positioned at the same world point (ax,ay,az). drei's <Html> renders each into its own absolutely-positioned DOM root, so the later-rendered overlays sat ON TOP of the earlier ones at identical x/y, swallowing pointer events. Only the target HUD (positioned at a different world point) and toolbar buttons (outside <Html>) worked. FIX: Wrap all three sub-cards in ONE <Html> root with style={{pointerEvents:'auto'}} + flex-col layout (Viewport.jsx lines 749-816). Now the cards occupy disjoint y-bands and each button's onClick fires correctly. Verified by ruler-cycle-axes-btn cycling state, ruler-snap-toggle-edge toggling kinds array, and ruler-clear-anchor-btn nulling rulerAnchor — all on real UI clicks.
